title: Consistence (Discontinued)
description: A resource pack that makes some adjustments to textures/models etc. such as the Dragon Egg and Creeper to be more consistent.
body: Consistence is simply a Resource Pack that makes changes to any "inconsistencies" (or personal peeves of mine) with Minecraft's textures/models. Such as the Dragon Egg having been overmodeled, or the Creeper using the old leaves texture.
